title: KHPT Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Manager Posts
description: The Karnataka Health Promotion Trust (KHPT) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Manager Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree, MBA can apply for the KHPT Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, application fee, salary,...
